## Description
Please include a summary of the changes and the related issue. Please also include relevant motivation and context.

Fixes # (issue number)

## Type of change
- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking change which fixes an issue)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking change which adds functionality)
- [ ] Breaking change (fix or feature that would cause existing functionality to not work as expected)
- [ ] This change requires a documentation update

## 🛡️ Sovereign Compliance Checklist
Because CivisOS is designed for untrusted environments and global survival, we must be absolutely certain about our dependencies and code structure. **You must check these boxes before this PR will be reviewed.**

- [ ] **No proprietary/closed-source dependencies added**: I confirm that all code and dependencies added in this PR are fully open-source and do not rely on proprietary, closed-source blobs, SDKs, or APIs.
- [ ] **Offline-First Compatibility**: I confirm that this feature works offline and does not break existing local mesh functionality.
- [ ] I have performed a self-review of my own code.
- [ ] I have commented my code, particularly in hard-to-understand areas.
- [ ] My changes generate no new warnings or linting errors.
